intro.title: Awesome Claude Code
intro.desc: The old ways have come and gone. It's time to embrace the next phase. The previous Table of Contents was no longer fit for purpose, so a new organizational system is being prepared. Thanks to everyone who has contributed to and supported this repo, be ye human or machine.
